# Toggle

A two-state button for inline preferences and toolbar controls.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/toggle
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="toggle" example={0} code={`<Toggle aria-label="Bold">B</Toggle>`} />

```tsx
<Toggle aria-label="Bold">B</Toggle>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="toggle"
  example={1}
  code={`<ToggleGroup type="single" defaultValue="left" aria-label="Alignment" attached>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="left" aria-label="Left">L</ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="center" aria-label="Center">C</ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="right" aria-label="Right">R</ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>`}
/>

```tsx
<ToggleGroup type="single" defaultValue="left" aria-label="Alignment" attached>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="left" aria-label="Left">
    L
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="center" aria-label="Center">
    C
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="right" aria-label="Right">
    R
  </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="toggle"
  example={2}
  code={`<ToggleGroup type="multiple" defaultValue={["bold"]} aria-label="Formatting">
  <ToggleGroupItem value="bold" aria-label="Bold">B</ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="italic" aria-label="Italic">I</ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="underline" aria-label="Underline">U</ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>`}
/>

```tsx
<ToggleGroup type="multiple" defaultValue={['bold']} aria-label="Formatting">
  <ToggleGroupItem value="bold" aria-label="Bold">
    B
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="italic" aria-label="Italic">
    I
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="underline" aria-label="Underline">
    U
  </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>
```

## Props

### `<Toggle>`

| Prop      | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                                    |
| --------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `radius`  | `ToggleRadius`  | No       | -       | -                                                              |
| `size`    | `ToggleSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                              |
| `tone`    | `ToggleTone`    | No       | -       | Selects the semantic color palette used when the toggle is on. |
| `variant` | `ToggleVariant` | No       | -       | -                                                              |

### `<Toggle.GroupItem>`

| Prop      | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                            |
| --------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| `radius`  | `ToggleRadius`  | No       | -       | Override inherited group settings on a per-item basis. |
| `size`    | `ToggleSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                      |
| `variant` | `ToggleVariant` | No       | -       | -                                                      |

### `<Toggle.GroupMultiple>`

| Prop            | Type                        | Required | Default | Description |
| --------------- | --------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `type`          | `'multiple'`                | Yes      | -       | -           |
| `value`         | `string[]`                  | No       | -       | -           |
| `defaultValue`  | `string[]`                  | No       | -       | -           |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string[]) => void` | No       | -       | -           |

### `<Toggle.Group>`

| Prop       | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                                                |
| ---------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `attached` | `boolean`       | No       | -       | When true, items sit flush against each other forming a segmented control. |
| `radius`   | `ToggleRadius`  | No       | -       | -                                                                          |
| `size`     | `ToggleSize`    | No       | -       | -                                                                          |
| `tone`     | `ToggleTone`    | No       | -       | Selects the semantic color palette used when an item is on.                |
| `variant`  | `ToggleVariant` | No       | -       | -                                                                          |

### `<Toggle.GroupSingle>`

| Prop            | Type                      | Required | Default | Description |
| --------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `type`          | `'single'`                | Yes      | -       | -           |
| `value`         | `string`                  | No       | -       | -           |
| `defaultValue`  | `string`                  | No       | -       | -           |
| `onValueChange` | `(value: string) => void` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant    | Values                           |
| ---------- | -------------------------------- |
| `size`     | `sm`, `md`, `lg`                 |
| `variant`  | `outline`, `ghost`, `solid`      |
| `radius`   | `none`, `sm`, `md`, `lg`, `full` |
| `attached` | `true`, `false`                  |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/toggle.json`
- Recipe: `toggle`
- Files: `src/components/ui/toggle.tsx`
